title: Thoughtly Contact
description: Schema for the Thoughtly Contact object used by the Thoughtly API. A Contact represents a person whom an Agent can call or message.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Contact, assigned by Thoughtly.

phone_number.description: E.164 phone number used to call or message the Contact.

email.description: Optional email address associated with the Contact.

country_code.description: ISO country code used when normalizing the phone number.

attributes.description: Custom key/value attributes referenced from Agent scripts as `{key_name}`.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the Contact was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the most recent Contact update.
